title: heliotropium molle
intro: Heliotropium molle, also known as the velvet leaf or baby heliotrope, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Heliotropium molle include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as treating skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis. Herbal preparations of Heliotropium molle can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support respiratory health and soothe skin irritations.
